title: melissa stricta
intro: Melissa stricta, also known as lemon balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Melissa stricta include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost mood and reduce stress. Melissa stricta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
